items.title: The Role of Contemplative Practices in Modern Mental Health
items.summary: This article examines the scientific validation and practical application of contemplative spiritual practices within modern mental health care, highlighting case studies and emerging research that demonstrate their efficacy in reducing anxiety, depression, and stress-related disorders.

items.title: Reimagining Tournament Structures: Balancing Competitiveness and Player Welfare
items.summary: The piece investigates recent shifts in scheduling, format, and rest periods in major sports leagues and international tournaments, focusing on how these changes impact player longevity, fan engagement, and the commercial ecosystem.

items.title: The Geopolitical Implications of Emerging Green Energy Alliances
items.summary: This article explores the strategic collaborations between nations investing in green energy infrastructure, the potential for energy independence, and the resulting shifts in traditional geopolitical alliances and conflicts.

items.title: The Ethics of AI-Generated News: Challenges and Opportunities
items.summary: The article critically examines how AI tools are being used to produce news content, the ethical dilemmas they pose, and the regulatory frameworks needed to ensure transparency and accountability in media.

items.title: Innovations in Public Health Delivery: Leveraging Technology for Rural Outreach
items.summary: This piece highlights case studies from various countries where technology-driven public health programmes have improved disease surveillance, vaccination rates, and maternal health outcomes, while discussing scalability challenges.
